places.name: Masdar City
places.description: Planned as the world’s first zero-carbon city, it had lofty ideals—but is only 5 percent completed and aiming for 50 percent carbon-neutral.

places.name: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque
places.description: Whitewashed mosque contains the world's largest carpet.

places.name: Ferrari World
places.description: This enormous sports car themed amusement park is home to the world’s fastest roller coaster.

places.name: Al Wathba Fossil Dunes
places.description: These otherworldly formations were shaped over millions of years by the forces of nature.

places.name: Abu Dhabi Falcon Hospital
places.description: The largest falcon hospital in the world, caring for over 6,000 feathered patients every year.

places.name: Yas Island Hotel
places.description: The world’s largest LED display, built over an F1 race circuit.

places.name: Capital Gate
places.description: No building in the world leans as far as the so-called “Leaning Tower of Abu Dhabi.”
